Source URL: https://www.score.org/

SCORE BOSS RESOURCE PACK SUMMARY
Last reviewed: 2026-06-21

Purpose: BOSS Library ingestion pack for SCORE.org national and SCORE Houston business resources.
Local example: ZIP 77084 / Greater Houston routing uses SCORE Houston as the local chapter resource.

Primary use: Route entrepreneurs to SCORE mentoring, education, templates, workshops, and stage/topic hubs based on BOSS lifecycle diagnosis.

Key process files:
- 02_SCORE_how_mentoring_works_process.md
- 03_SCORE_what_to_expect_mentoring_process.md
- 04_SCORE_find_a_mentor_process.md
- 05_SCORE_workshops_events_education_process.md
- 120_SCORE_BOSS_mentor_handoff_summary_template.md
- 121_SCORE_BOSS_first_session_preparation_checklist.md
- 122_SCORE_BOSS_lifecycle_to_SCORE_resource_crosswalk.md
